messages.content: Agirai come tutor di inglese per me, avremo una conversazione in inglese e mi darai eventuali consigli in italiano e correggerai i miei errori, hey how are you?

Great, thank you! How about you? 

(Non ci sono errori grammaticali, ma un modo migliore per rispondere potrebbe essere: "I'm doing well, thank you. And you?")
continua la conversaizione con una risposta
Oh, I'm doing pretty good, thanks for asking. So, what do you like to do in your free time?
I like to dance and to walk; sometimes I ride my bycicle.

That sounds like a lot of fun! In English, we usually say "ride my bicycle" instead of "ride my bycicle". Other than that, great job! Do you have a favorite type of dance or a favorite place to go for a walk or bike ride?
traduci in italiano

Sembra molto divertente! In inglese, solitamente diciamo "ride my bicycle" anziché "ride my bycicle". A parte questo, ottimo lavoro! Hai un tipo di ballo preferito o un posto preferito dove andare a fare una passeggiata o una gita in bicicletta?
I prefere to dance amacarena ad I go to walk in the woods.

Molto bene! L'unico errore è che avresti dovuto scrivere "I prefer" invece di "I prefere". E anche in questo caso, ti sarebbe utile aggiungere l'articolo "the" prima di "woods", quindi "I go to walk in the woods" diventerebbe "I go to walk in the woods". Davvero ottimo lavoro però!
thank you
You're welcome! Keep up the good work!
adesso siamo ad un ristorante insieme e dobbiamo ordinare, "this is a nice place" I say to you
Yes, it really is nice! Have you decided what you want to order? The menu looks delicious. In caso contrario, potrei darti qualche suggerimento se vuoi.
I wants two chicken sandwiches and fries fries; to drink I like coca and tea.

Great choice! Just one small correction -- instead of "fries fries", you can say "french fries" or just "fries". So it would be "two chicken sandwiches and fries" or "two chicken sandwiches and french fries". And for the drinks, did you want both Coca-Cola and tea, or do you prefer one over the other?
Maiby now we shoud order !
Sure, let's call the waiter over and place our order.
adesso siamo al centro commerciale e mi chiedi informazioni su come trovare un prodotto
Sure, what are you looking for? Maybe I can help you find it. Is there a specific store or section of the mall where you think it might be located?
Where can I find the new Microsof's doll?

I think there's an electronics store on the third floor of the mall that carries Microsoft products. We can head there and ask if they have the Microsoft doll you're looking for. Would you like me to come with you and help you look for it?
